resources.title: Medi-Cal Dental (Smile California) Member Help
resources.description: Free dental coverage help. Call to find a Medi-Cal dentist, ask about treatment, or file a complaint. Open Monday-Friday, 8 a.m.-5 p.m.
resources.languages: Free interpreter for in-language assistance; TTY 1-800-735-2922

resources.title: Medi-Cal Rx Customer Service Center
resources.description: Help with covered prescription drugs, finding a pharmacy, and prescription problems. Available 24 hours a day, 7 days a week.

resources.title: Health Care Options (Enroll, Change, or Keep a Plan)
resources.description: Call to join a Medi-Cal health plan, switch plans, or get help choosing. Open Monday-Friday, 8 a.m.-6 p.m.
resources.languages: Help in 19+ languages including Spanish, Chinese, Vietnamese, Tagalog, Korean, Armenian; TTY 1-800-430-7077

resources.title: DHCS Medi-Cal Managed Care Office of the Ombudsman
resources.description: Free help solving problems with your Medi-Cal managed care plan, like denied care or access issues. Open Monday-Friday, 8 a.m.-5 p.m. Have your Medi-Cal ID ready.

resources.title: Health Consumer Alliance (Free Legal Help)
resources.description: Free, confidential help with health coverage problems, denied services, billing issues, and filing appeals or grievances. Free for everyone, regardless of income.
resources.languages: Free legal services in all languages; TTY 1-877-735-2929

resources.title: Medi-Cal Member Help Line (DHCS)
resources.description: General Medi-Cal help line for questions about your benefits and your rights. Open Monday-Friday, 8 a.m.-5 p.m.
resources.languages: Bilingual staff and free interpreter services; TTY 711 (CA State Relay)

resources.title: BenefitsCal (Apply, Renew, Report Changes)
resources.description: Official online portal to apply for Medi-Cal, complete your yearly renewal, upload documents, and report changes like a new address or income. Report changes within 10 days.

resources.title: LA County DPSS Customer Service Center
resources.description: Los Angeles County office for Medi-Cal. Call to renew, report changes, ask about your case, or apply for benefits.
resources.languages: Multilingual support including Spanish, Armenian, Cambodian, Vietnamese, Mandarin, Cantonese, Farsi, Tagalog, Russian, Korean

resources.title: 211 LA (Food, Housing, Utilities & Social Needs)
resources.description: Free, 24/7 help connecting Los Angeles County residents to food, housing, utility assistance, and other community resources. Just dial 211.

resources.title: LA County Dept. of Mental Health ACCESS Line
resources.description: 24/7 help line for mental health and substance use services in Los Angeles County, including crisis support, referrals, and crisis teams.
resources.languages: Interpreter services available; call 711 relay for hearing/speech disabilities

resources.title: LA County Substance Abuse Service Helpline (SASH)
resources.description: Free 24/7 helpline for help with substance use, misuse, and addiction. A counselor does a brief screening and refers you to a treatment provider.

resources.title: 988 Suicide & Crisis Lifeline
resources.description: Free, confidential 24/7 support for anyone in suicidal, mental health, or substance use crisis, or emotional distress. Call, text, or chat anytime.
resources.languages: English and Spanish (dial 988 then press 2, or text AYUDA to 988); interpreters in 240+ languages; Deaf/Hard of Hearing services

resources.title: Medi-Cal Transportation (NEMT)
resources.description: Non-Emergency Medical Transportation by ambulance, wheelchair van, or litter van for members who cannot travel by car or bus to covered care. Needs a provider's prescription. Managed care members call their plan; fee-for-service members ask their provider.

resources.title: Medi-Cal Non-Medical Transportation (NMT)
resources.description: Rides (car, bus pass, taxi, or van) to and from covered Medi-Cal services like doctor and dental visits or picking up prescriptions. Available with full-scope Medi-Cal; no prescription needed. Managed care members call their plan to arrange it.
